name: Rajesh Kumar
text: The cooling performance is exceptional. Room reaches desired temp in minutes. Installation team was professional and quick.

name: Priya Sharma
text: Best AC purchase ever! Inverter tech really saves electricity. WiFi control is so convenient. Highly recommended!

name: Amit Patel
text: Ultra-silent model is perfect for bedroom. Sleep peacefully without noise. Great build quality too!

name: Sneha Reddy
text: The AMC plan is fantastic! Regular maintenance visits keep my AC running perfectly year-round.
